name: Bernaise Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine vinegar, white wine, pepper, scallions, and tarragon in a saucepan.
2. Cook over low heat until the mixture reduces by half, about 8 minutes.
3. Strain the mixture into the top of a double boiler.
4. Using a wire whisk or rotary beater, beat in the beaten egg yolks and salt.
5. Cook over hot water until thickened.
6. Beat in butter tablespoon at a time.
7. Stir over heat until creamy, about 1 minute.
8. Serve hot over beef or fish fillets.
